detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SIMPSONDAO.openTrading() (SIMPSONDAO.sol#577-595):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#581)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (SIMPSONDAO.sol#591)
	SIMPSONDAO.tradingOpen (SIMPSONDAO.sol#279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SIMPSONDAO.openTrading() (SIMPSONDAO.sol#577-595)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SIMPSONDAO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#437-507):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#489)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#521-533)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#495)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#571)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#505)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#665)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#645)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#647)
	SIMPSONDAO._rOwned (SIMPSONDAO.sol#239) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SIMPSONDAO._takeTeam(uint256) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#659-667)
	- SIMPSONDAO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#641-655)
	- SIMPSONDAO.balanceOf(address) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#355-359)
	- SIMPSONDAO.constructor() (SIMPSONDAO.sol#305-319)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#505)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#673)
	SIMPSONDAO._rTotal (SIMPSONDAO.sol#255) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SIMPSONDAO._getCurrentSupply() (SIMPSONDAO.sol#765-775)
	- SIMPSONDAO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#671-677)
	- SIMPSONDAO.constructor() (SIMPSONDAO.sol#305-319)
	- SIMPSONDAO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SIMPSONDAO.sol#411-419)
